'''Elza Monimi''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Slavery/Legends|slave]] who lived on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] prior to the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. He was captured by [[Krayn]].

As of [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]] he lived in a settlement on Tatooine. When suspicious looking people from outside of the town started sneaking around the neighborhood during the nights, Monimi collected [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] from his neighbors to pay a [[Spacer/Legends|spacer]] to deal with these strangers.<ref name="SWG">{{GalaxiesAED}} - Tatooine terminal mission "Quieting The Nosy Neighbor"</ref>
